Home / Service Areas / Tacoma

Tree removal in Tacoma, WA

Trusted local professionals serving Tacoma and surrounding communities

Serving Tacoma, WA

Tree Service By Northwest extends its professional tree care services to Tacoma, Washington. With its diverse neighborhoods, including the historic Stadium District with its charming 1900s-20s Craftsman homes, Tacoma offers a unique landscape for tree care. We are committed to providing safe, efficient, and environmentally responsible tree services to the Tacoma community. The climate in Tacoma, characterized by mild, wet winters, can create challenges for tree health. The constant moisture can lead to fungal diseases and weakened root systems. Tree Service By Northwest offers a full range of services, including tree pruning, disease diagnosis, and preventative care, to help your trees thrive in Tacoma's unique environment. We also specialize in the safe removal of large and hazardous trees, ensuring the safety of your property and surrounding areas.

Tacoma's mix of historic architecture and established trees requires a sensitive approach to tree care that respects the city's unique character.

Tree removal Services in Tacoma

Tree Removal

Safely and efficiently removing trees of any size and species.

Complete stump removal to eliminate hazards and improve your landscape.

Arborist Consultation

Expert advice on tree health, care, and risk assessment.

Learn more →

Storm Damage Cleanup

Comprehensive storm damage cleanup services to restore your property.
